falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would indicate a high-probability blowoff top, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and UNKNOWN phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A confirmed breakout above this key long-term trendline would invalidate the pattern's bearish implications and suggest a new bullish phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: A confirmed bullish trend forms (5 consecutive weeks of higher highs and higher lows)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would directly contradict the bottom_2024_aug pattern's typical bearish trajectory, proving the current UNKNOWN verdict incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
